verses.latin_vulgate: Hæc dicit Dominus : Cælum sedes mea,  terra autem scabellum pedum meorum.  Quæ est ista domus quam ædificabitis mihi ?  et quis est iste locus quietis meæ ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כֹּ֚ה אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֔ה הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם כִּסְאִ֔י וְהָאָ֖רֶץ הֲדֹ֣ם רַגְלָ֑י אֵי־זֶ֥ה בַ֙יִת֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תִּבְנוּ־לִ֔י וְאֵי־זֶ֥ה מָק֖וֹם מְנוּחָתִֽי׃
verses.king_james: Thus saith the Lord, The heaven is my throne, and the earth is my footstool: where is the house that ye build unto me? and where is the place of my rest?

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnia hæc manus mea fecit,  et facta sunt universa ista,  dicit Dominus ;  ad quem autem respiciam, nisi ad pauperculum,  et contritum spiritu, et trementem sermones meos ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֶת־כׇּל־אֵ֙לֶּה֙ יָדִ֣י עָשָׂ֔תָה וַיִּהְי֥וּ כׇל־אֵ֖לֶּה נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאֶל־זֶ֣ה אַבִּ֔יט אֶל־עָנִי֙ וּנְכֵה־ר֔וּחַ וְחָרֵ֖ד עַל־דְּבָרִֽי׃
verses.king_james: For all those things hath mine hand made, and all those things have been, saith the Lord: but to this man will I look, even to him that is poor and of a contrite spirit, and trembleth at my word.

verses.latin_vulgate: Qui immolat bovem, quasi qui interficiat virum ;  qui mactat pecus, quasi qui excerebret canem ;  qui offert oblationem, quasi qui sanguinem suillum offerat ;  qui recordatur thuris, quasi qui benedicat idolo.  Hæc omnia elegerunt in viis suis,  et in abominationibus suis anima eorum delectata est.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שׁוֹחֵ֨ט הַשּׁ֜וֹר מַכֵּה־אִ֗ישׁ זוֹבֵ֤חַ הַשֶּׂה֙ עֹ֣רֵֽף כֶּ֔לֶב מַעֲלֵ֤ה מִנְחָה֙ דַּם־חֲזִ֔יר מַזְכִּ֥יר לְבֹנָ֖ה מְבָ֣רֵֽךְ אָ֑וֶן גַּם־הֵ֗מָּה בָּֽחֲרוּ֙ בְּדַרְכֵיהֶ֔ם וּבְשִׁקּוּצֵיהֶ֖ם נַפְשָׁ֥ם חָפֵֽצָה׃
verses.king_james: He that killeth an ox is as if he slew a man; he that sacrificeth a lamb, as if he cut off a dog’s neck; he that offereth an oblation, as if he offered swine’s blood; he that burneth incense, as if he blessed an idol. Yea, they have chosen their own ways, and their soul delighteth in their abominations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde et ego eligam illusiones eorum,  et quæ timebant adducam eis ;  quia vocavi, et non erat qui responderet ;  locutus sum, et non audierunt ;  feceruntque malum in oculis meis,  et quæ nolui elegerunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: גַּם־אֲנִ֞י אֶבְחַ֣ר בְּתַעֲלֻלֵיהֶ֗ם וּמְגֽוּרֹתָם֙ אָבִ֣יא לָהֶ֔ם יַ֤עַן קָרָ֙אתִי֙ וְאֵ֣ין עוֹנֶ֔ה דִּבַּ֖רְתִּי וְלֹ֣א שָׁמֵ֑עוּ וַיַּעֲשׂ֤וּ הָרַע֙ בְּעֵינַ֔י וּבַאֲשֶׁ֥ר לֹא־חָפַ֖צְתִּי בָּחָֽרוּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: I also will choose their delusions, and will bring their fears upon them; because when I called, none did answer; when I spake, they did not hear: but they did evil before mine eyes, and chose that in which I delighted not.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audite verbum Domini,  qui tremitis ad verbum ejus.  Dixerunt fratres vestri odientes vos,  et abjicientes propter nomen meum :  Glorificetur Dominus,  et videbimus in lætitia vestra ;  ipsi autem confundentur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁמְעוּ֙ דְּבַר־יְהֹוָ֔ה הַחֲרֵדִ֖ים אֶל־דְּבָר֑וֹ אָמְרוּ֩ אֲחֵיכֶ֨ם שֹׂנְאֵיכֶ֜ם מְנַדֵּיכֶ֗ם לְמַ֤עַן שְׁמִי֙ יִכְבַּ֣ד יְהֹוָ֔ה וְנִרְאֶ֥ה בְשִׂמְחַתְכֶ֖ם וְהֵ֥ם יֵבֹֽשׁוּ׃
verses.king_james: Hear the word of the Lord, ye that tremble at his word; Your brethren that hated you, that cast you out for my name’s sake, said, Let the Lord be glorified: but he shall appear to your joy, and they shall be ashamed.

verses.latin_vulgate: Vox populi de civitate,  vox de templo,  vox Domini  reddentis retributionem inimicis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ק֤וֹל שָׁאוֹן֙ מֵעִ֔יר ק֖וֹל מֵהֵיכָ֑ל ק֣וֹל יְהֹוָ֔ה מְשַׁלֵּ֥ם גְּמ֖וּל לְאֹיְבָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: A voice of noise from the city, a voice from the temple, a voice of the Lord that rendereth recompence to his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Antequam parturiret, peperit ;  antequam veniret partus ejus,  peperit masculum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בְּטֶ֥רֶם תָּחִ֖יל יָלָ֑דָה בְּטֶ֨רֶם יָב֥וֹא חֵ֛בֶל לָ֖הּ וְהִמְלִ֥יטָה זָכָֽר׃
verses.king_james: Before she travailed, she brought forth; before her pain came, she was delivered of a man child.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quis audivit umquam tale ?  et quis vidit huic simile ?  numquid parturiet terra in die una,  aut parietur gens simul,  quia parturivit et peperit  Sion filios suos ?
verses.hebrew_masoretic: מִֽי־שָׁמַ֣ע כָּזֹ֗את מִ֤י רָאָה֙ כָּאֵ֔לֶּה הֲי֤וּחַל אֶ֙רֶץ֙ בְּי֣וֹם אֶחָ֔ד אִם־יִוָּ֥לֵֽד־גּ֖וֹי פַּ֣עַם אֶחָ֑ת כִּי־חָ֛לָה גַּם־יָלְדָ֥ה צִיּ֖וֹן אֶת־בָּנֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Who hath heard such a thing? who hath seen such things? Shall the earth be made to bring forth in one day? or shall a nation be born at once? for as soon as Zion travailed, she brought forth her children.

verses.latin_vulgate: Numquid ego qui alios parere facio, ipse non pariam ?  dicit Dominus.  Si ego, qui generationem ceteris tribuo, sterilis ero ?  ait Dominus Deus tuus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַאֲנִ֥י אַשְׁבִּ֛יר וְלֹ֥א אוֹלִ֖יד יֹאמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה אִם־אֲנִ֧י הַמּוֹלִ֛יד וְעָצַ֖רְתִּי אָמַ֥ר אֱלֹהָֽיִךְ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: Shall I bring to the birth, and not cause to bring forth? saith the Lord: shall I cause to bring forth, and shut the womb? saith thy God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætamini cum Jerusalem et exsultate in ea,  omnes qui diligitis eam ;  gaudete cum ea gaudio,  universi qui lugetis super eam :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׂמְח֧וּ אֶת־יְרוּשָׁלַ֛͏ִם וְגִ֥ילוּ בָ֖הּ כׇּל־אֹהֲבֶ֑יהָ שִׂ֤ישׂוּ אִתָּהּ֙ מָשׂ֔וֹשׂ כׇּל־הַמִּֽתְאַבְּלִ֖ים עָלֶֽיהָ׃
verses.king_james: Rejoice ye with Jerusalem, and be glad with her, all ye that love her: rejoice for joy with her, all ye that mourn for her:

verses.latin_vulgate: ut sugatis et repleamini  ab ubere consolationis ejus ;  ut mulgeatis et deliciis affluatis  ab omnimoda gloria ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְמַ֤עַן תִּֽינְקוּ֙ וּשְׂבַעְתֶּ֔ם מִשֹּׁ֖ד תַּנְחֻמֶ֑יהָ לְמַ֧עַן תָּמֹ֛צּוּ וְהִתְעַנַּגְתֶּ֖ם מִזִּ֥יז כְּבוֹדָֽהּ׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: That ye may suck, and be satisfied with the breasts of her consolations; that ye may milk out, and be delighted with the abundance of her glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia hæc dicit Dominus :  Ecce ego declinabo super eam quasi fluvium pacis,  et quasi torrentem inundantem gloriam gentium,  quam sugetis :  ad ubera portabimini,  et super genua blandientur vobis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי־כֹ֣ה ׀ אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֗ה הִנְנִ֣י נֹטֶֽה־אֵ֠לֶ֠יהָ כְּנָהָ֨ר שָׁל֜וֹם וּכְנַ֧חַל שׁוֹטֵ֛ף כְּב֥וֹד גּוֹיִ֖ם וִֽינַקְתֶּ֑ם עַל־צַד֙ תִּנָּשֵׂ֔אוּ וְעַל־בִּרְכַּ֖יִם תְּשׇׁעֳשָֽׁעוּ׃
verses.king_james: For thus saith the Lord, Behold, I will extend peace to her like a river, and the glory of the Gentiles like a flowing stream: then shall ye suck, ye shall be borne upon her sides, and be dandled upon her knees.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quomodo si cui mater blandiatur,  ita ego consolabor vos,  et in Jerusalem consolabimini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כְּאִ֕ישׁ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אִמּ֖וֹ תְּנַחֲמֶ֑נּוּ כֵּ֤ן אָֽנֹכִי֙ אֲנַ֣חֶמְכֶ֔ם וּבִירוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם תְּנֻחָֽמוּ׃
verses.king_james: As one whom his mother comforteth, so will I comfort you; and ye shall be comforted in Jerusalem.

verses.latin_vulgate: Videbitis, et gaudebit cor vestrum,  et ossa vestra quasi herba germinabunt :  et cognoscetur manus Domini servis ejus,  et indignabitur inimicis suis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּרְאִיתֶם֙ וְשָׂ֣שׂ לִבְּכֶ֔ם וְעַצְמוֹתֵיכֶ֖ם כַּדֶּ֣שֶׁא תִפְרַ֑חְנָה וְנוֹדְעָ֤ה יַד־יְהֹוָה֙ אֶת־עֲבָדָ֔יו וְזָעַ֖ם אֶת־אֹיְבָֽיו׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And when ye see this, your heart shall rejoice, and your bones shall flourish like an herb: and the hand of the Lord shall be known toward his servants, and his indignation toward his enemies.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia ecce Dominus in igne veniet,  et quasi turbo quadrigæ ejus,  reddere in indignatione furorem suum  et increpationem suam in flamma ignis :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּֽי־הִנֵּ֤ה יְהֹוָה֙ בָּאֵ֣שׁ יָב֔וֹא וְכַסּוּפָ֖ה מַרְכְּבֹתָ֑יו לְהָשִׁ֤יב בְּחֵמָה֙ אַפּ֔וֹ וְגַעֲרָת֖וֹ בְּלַהֲבֵי־אֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: For, behold, the Lord will come with fire, and with his chariots like a whirlwind, to render his anger with fury, and his rebuke with flames of fire.

verses.latin_vulgate: quia in igne Dominus dijudicabit,  et in gladio suo ad omnem carnem ;  et multiplicabuntur interfecti a Domino,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֤י בָאֵשׁ֙ יְהֹוָ֣ה נִשְׁפָּ֔ט וּבְחַרְבּ֖וֹ אֶת־כׇּל־בָּשָׂ֑ר וְרַבּ֖וּ חַֽלְלֵ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: For by fire and by his sword will the Lord plead with all flesh: and the slain of the Lord shall be many.

verses.latin_vulgate: qui sanctificabantur et mundos se putabant in hortis  post januam intrinsecus,  qui comedebant carnem suillam,  et abominationem et murem :  simul consumentur, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הַמִּתְקַדְּשִׁ֨ים וְהַמִּֽטַּהֲרִ֜ים אֶל־הַגַּנּ֗וֹת אַחַ֤ר (אחד) [אַחַת֙] בַּתָּ֔וֶךְ אֹֽכְלֵי֙ בְּשַׂ֣ר הַחֲזִ֔יר וְהַשֶּׁ֖קֶץ וְהָעַכְבָּ֑ר יַחְדָּ֥ו יָסֻ֖פוּ נְאֻם־יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: They that sanctify themselves, and purify themselves in the gardens behind one tree in the midst, eating swine’s flesh, and the abomination, and the mouse, shall be consumed together, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ego autem opera eorum et cogitationes eorum  venio ut congregem,  cum omnibus gentibus et linguis :  et venient, et videbunt gloriam meam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאָנֹכִ֗י מַֽעֲשֵׂיהֶם֙ וּמַחְשְׁבֹ֣תֵיהֶ֔ם בָּאָ֕ה לְקַבֵּ֥ץ אֶת־כׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֖ם וְהַלְּשֹׁנ֑וֹת וּבָ֖אוּ וְרָא֥וּ אֶת־כְּבוֹדִֽי׃
verses.king_james: For I know their works and their thoughts: it shall come, that I will gather all nations and tongues; and they shall come, and see my glory.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et ponam in eis signum,  et mittam ex eis qui salvati fuerint, ad gentes  in mare, in Africam, et Lydiam, tendentes sagittam ;  in Italiam et Græciam,  ad insulas longe,  ad eos qui non audierunt de me,  et non viderunt gloriam meam.  Et annuntiabunt gloriam meam gentibus ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְשַׂמְתִּ֨י בָהֶ֜ם א֗וֹת וְשִׁלַּחְתִּ֣י מֵהֶ֣ם ׀ פְּ֠לֵיטִ֠ים אֶֽל־הַגּוֹיִ֞ם תַּרְשִׁ֨ישׁ פּ֥וּל וְל֛וּד מֹ֥שְׁכֵי קֶ֖שֶׁת תֻּבַ֣ל וְיָוָ֑ן הָאִיִּ֣ים הָרְחֹקִ֗ים אֲשֶׁ֨ר לֹֽא־שָׁמְע֤וּ אֶת־שִׁמְעִי֙ וְלֹא־רָא֣וּ אֶת־כְּבוֹדִ֔י וְהִגִּ֥ידוּ אֶת־כְּבוֹדִ֖י בַּגּוֹיִֽם׃
verses.king_james: And I will set a sign among them, and I will send those that escape of them unto the nations, to Tarshish, Pul, and Lud, that draw the bow, to Tubal, and Javan, to the isles afar off, that have not heard my fame, neither have seen my glory; and they shall declare my glory among the Gentiles.

verses.latin_vulgate: et adducent omnes fratres vestros  de cunctis gentibus  donum Domino,  in equis, et in quadrigis, et in lecticis,  et in mulis, et in carrucis,  ad montem sanctum meum  Jerusalem, dicit Dominus :  quomodo si inferant filii Israël munus  in vase mundo in domum Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהֵבִ֣יאוּ אֶת־כׇּל־אֲחֵיכֶ֣ם מִכׇּל־הַגּוֹיִ֣ם ׀ מִנְחָ֣ה ׀ לַיהֹוָ֡ה בַּסּוּסִ֡ים וּ֠בָרֶ֠כֶב וּבַצַּבִּ֨ים וּבַפְּרָדִ֜ים וּבַכִּרְכָּר֗וֹת עַ֣ל הַ֥ר קׇדְשִׁ֛י יְרוּשָׁלַ֖͏ִם אָמַ֣ר יְהֹוָ֑ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֣ר יָבִ֩יאוּ֩ בְנֵ֨י יִשְׂרָאֵ֧ל אֶת־הַמִּנְחָ֛ה בִּכְלִ֥י טָה֖וֹר בֵּ֥ית יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they shall bring all your brethren for an offering unto the Lord out of all nations upon horses, and in chariots, and in litters, and upon mules, and upon swift beasts, to my holy mountain Jerusalem, saith the Lord, as the children of Israel bring an offering in a clean vessel into the house of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et assumam ex eis  in sacerdotes et Levitas, dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְגַם־מֵהֶ֥ם אֶקַּ֛ח לַכֹּהֲנִ֥ים לַלְוִיִּ֖ם אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And I will also take of them for priests and for Levites, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia sicut cæli novi et terra nova,  quæ ego facio stare coram me, dicit Dominus,  sic stabit semen vestrum et nomen vestrum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֣י כַאֲשֶׁ֣ר הַשָּׁמַ֣יִם הַ֠חֲדָשִׁ֠ים וְהָאָ֨רֶץ הַחֲדָשָׁ֜ה אֲשֶׁ֨ר אֲנִ֥י עֹשֶׂ֛ה עֹמְדִ֥ים לְפָנַ֖י נְאֻם־יְהֹוָ֑ה כֵּ֛ן יַעֲמֹ֥ד זַרְעֲכֶ֖ם וְשִׁמְכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: For as the new heavens and the new earth, which I will make, shall remain before me, saith the Lord, so shall your seed and your name remain.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et erit mensis ex mense,  et sabbatum ex sabbato :  veniet omnis caro ut adoret coram facie mea,  dicit Dominus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה מִֽדֵּי־חֹ֙דֶשׁ֙ בְּחׇדְשׁ֔וֹ וּמִדֵּ֥י שַׁבָּ֖ת בְּשַׁבַּתּ֑וֹ יָב֧וֹא כׇל־בָּשָׂ֛ר לְהִשְׁתַּחֲוֺ֥ת לְפָנַ֖י אָמַ֥ר יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And it shall come to pass, that from one new moon to another, and from one sabbath to another, shall all flesh come to worship before me, saith the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et egredientur, et videbunt cadavera  virorum qui prævaricati sunt in me ;  vermis eorum non morietur,  et ignis eorum non extinguetur :  et erunt usque ad satietatem visionis omni carni.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְיָצְא֣וּ וְרָא֔וּ בְּפִגְרֵי֙ הָאֲנָשִׁ֔ים הַפֹּשְׁעִ֖ים בִּ֑י כִּ֣י תוֹלַעְתָּ֞ם לֹ֣א תָמ֗וּת וְאִשָּׁם֙ לֹ֣א תִכְבֶּ֔ה וְהָי֥וּ דֵרָא֖וֹן לְכׇל־בָּשָֽׂר׃
verses.king_james: And they shall go forth, and look upon the carcases of the men that have transgressed against me: for their worm shall not die, neither shall their fire be quenched; and they shall be an abhorring unto all flesh.
